underlying_goal: Debug why MCTS-based board game AI always loses via gate breach, fix die roll bugs, and improve game state correctness
friction_detail: Initial die roll fix left barricade force-unwrap crash, and barricade breach didn't set defeat state causing games to end in limbo.
brief_summary: User needed help debugging why their board game AI always lost quickly; Claude found critical die-roll and game-state bugs, fixed them iteratively, added tests, and improved code safety.
